title: The Right Way To Build AI Agents — With NVIDIA's Adel El Hallak and ServiceNow's Joe Davis
summary: Alex Kantrowitz interviews NVIDIA's Adel El Hallak and ServiceNow's Joe Davis about building safe and governable AI agents. They discuss ServiceNow's L1-AI-IT specialist system that automated 90% of internal support tickets and share insights on enterprise AI agent deployment.
